flags.blocking_effect: stops affected DKR or branch when discovery budget is exhausted or helper prevents OKRA work
flags.current_evidence: DKR worker returned learning checkpoint within budget; helper available

flags.blocking_effect: pauses committing moves on missing source read record, missing write record, store verification failure, or single-narrative acceptance
flags.current_evidence: required source content read records exist; final write and verify evidence are required before acceptance

flags.blocking_effect: stops branches whose CKR moved but objective remains flat after lag window
flags.current_evidence: storage governance objective has no lag for fixture actions and current direct read is in band

flags.blocking_effect: stops proposed moves outside approved paths or attempts to change frame/thresholds
